title: Malarnthum Malaratha Lyrics Pasamalar
stanzas:
vandhu vidindhum vidiyaatha
kaalai pozhuthaaga
vilaindha kalai annamae.

nadhiyil vilaiyaadi
kodiyil thalai seevi.
nadantha ilam thendralae

valar podhigai malai thondri
madhurai nagar kandu
pozhindha thamizh mandrame](2)

Yaanai padai kondu
saenai pala vendru
aala pirandhaayadaa
puvi aala pirandhaayadaa

aththai magalai manamkondu
ilamai vazhi kandu
vazha pirandhaayadaa
vazha pirandhaayadaa

aththai magalai manamkondu
ilamai vazhi kandu
vazha pirandhaayadaa

thanga kedaiyaaram
vaira maniyaaram
thandhu manam paesuvaar
porul thandhu
manam paesuvaar

maaman thangai magalaana
mangai unakkaaga
ulagai vilai paesuvaar
ulagai vilai paesuvaar

maaman thangai magalaana
mangai unakkaaga
ulagai vilai paesuvaar

nadhiyil vilaiyaadi
kodiyil thalai seevi.
nadantha ilam thendralae

valar podhigai malai thondri
madhurai nagar kandu
pozhindha thamizh mandrame

Siragil enai moodi
arumai magal pola
valartha kathai sollavaa

kanavil ninaiyaatha
kaalam idai vandhu
priththa kadhai sollavaa
priththa kadhai sollavaa

kannin mani pola
maniyin nizhal pola
kalandhu pirandhomada

indha mannum kadal vaanum

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Malarnthum Malaratha?

The song conveys deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the beauty of romantic relationships.

What is the context of the song in the movie Pasamalar?

In Pasamalar, the song is a poignant expression of the characters' feelings, enhancing the narrative of love and sacrifice.

Who are the singers of Malarnthum Malaratha?

The song features the melodious voices of P. Susheela and T.M. Soundararajan.

When was Malarnthum Malaratha released?

The song was released in 1970.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Malarnthum Malaratha from the movie Pasamalar is a beautiful melody that encapsulates the essence of love and longing. It evokes a sense of nostalgia and romanticism, making it a perfect fit for intimate occasions. The heartfelt lyrics and soulful singing create an emotional atmosphere that resonates with listeners. This classic piece remains a cherished favorite for its timeless appeal and emotional depth.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Malarnthum Malaratha is a timeless classic that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With its enchanting lyrics and soulful rendition, this song from the Pasamalar movie resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the magic of P. Susheela and T.M. Soundararajan as they bring this heartfelt melody to life.
stanzaMeanings: Like a flower blooming, your eyes shine like half a flower.
The morning that comes and goes, like a beautiful dawn.
Playing in the river, with a flag on my head, like a young breeze.
In the rising dawn, I saw the beautiful city of Madurai.
With the army of elephants, you were born as a leader, oh earth, you were born as a leader.
With a heart full of love, you found a way to live, you found a way to live.
With a heart full of love, you found a way to live.
With a heart full of love, you found a way to live, you found a way to live.
With a heart full of love, you found a way to live.
The golden treasure, the precious gem, they speak with their hearts, they speak with their hearts.
The uncle and sister, the beautiful girl, they speak of the world for you, they speak of the world for you.
The uncle and sister, the beautiful girl, for you..
The uncle and sister, the beautiful girl, they speak of the world for you.
Playing in the river, with a flag on my head, like a young breeze.
In the rising dawn, I saw the beautiful city of Madurai.
Will you tell the story of raising me like a precious daughter?
Will you tell the story of the time that came in dreams?
Like a gem in the eye, like a shadow of a gem, we were born together.
Even if this earth, sea, and sky disappear, relationships cannot be forgotten, they cannot be broken.
